justification: The question concerns the price movements and option-adjusted spreads of high-yield corporate debt indices, which is a standard financial market metric.
question: Will the option-adjusted spread of the ICE BofA Euro High Yield Index, which tracks the performance of below investment grade corporate debt issued in the euro domestic or eurobond markets, have increased by 2026-04-05 as compared to its value on 2026-03-29?
